title: In-Flight Refueling
description: Operates aerial refueling systems aboard tanker aircraft to transfer fuel to receiver aircraft during flight.

title: Flight Engineer
description: Monitors and manages aircraft systems during flight to ensure safe and efficient mission execution.

title: Aircraft Loadmaster
description: Plans and executes the loading, securing, and airdrop of cargo and passengers on military transport aircraft.

title: Airborne Cryptologic Language Analyst
description: Collects and analyzes foreign language communications from airborne platforms to support intelligence operations.

title: Air Traffic Control
description: Directs aircraft in flight and on the ground to ensure safe and efficient movement through controlled airspace.

title: Command Post
description: Manages command and control communications and coordinates operational information for base commanders.

title: Space Systems Operations
description: Operates and maintains satellite command and control systems, missile warning, and space surveillance systems.

title: Cyber Defense Operations
description: Protects Air Force networks and information systems by monitoring, detecting, and responding to cyber threats.

title: All Source Intelligence Analyst
description: Collects, processes, and analyzes intelligence from multiple sources to produce assessments for military operations.

title: Geospatial Intelligence Analyst
description: Analyzes imagery and geospatial data to produce intelligence products supporting targeting and mission planning.

title: Fusion Analyst
description: Integrates multi-source intelligence data to identify threats, networks, and targets for operational commanders.

title: Survival, Evasion, Resistance, and Escape
description: Trains aircrew and other personnel in survival techniques, evasion tactics, and resistance to enemy captivity.

title: Weather
description: Observes, analyzes, and forecasts atmospheric and space weather conditions to support military operations.

title: Pararescue
description: Conducts personnel recovery and combat search-and-rescue operations in hostile or denied territory.

title: Combat Control
description: Deploys into hostile environments to establish assault zones, provide air traffic control, and call in airstrikes.

title: Tactical Air Control Party
description: Embeds with ground combat units to coordinate close air support and manage air-to-ground communications.

title: Tactical Aircraft Maintenance
description: Performs scheduled and unscheduled maintenance on fighter and attack aircraft systems and components.

title: Aerospace Maintenance
description: Performs inspections, maintenance, and repairs on aircraft airframes, engines, and related support systems.

title: Aerospace Propulsion
description: Tests, repairs, and overhauls aircraft turbine engines, engine components, and related propulsion systems.

title: Materiel Management
description: Controls supply inventories, manages equipment accountability, and provides logistics support for Air Force units.

title: Vehicle Operations
description: Operates and dispatches military and government vehicles to transport personnel, equipment, and cargo.

title: Air Transportation
description: Plans and executes the loading, unloading, and movement of passengers and cargo on military airlift aircraft.

title: Electrical Systems
description: Installs, maintains, and repairs electrical power distribution systems on Air Force installations worldwide.

title: Engineering
description: Manages construction projects, conducts facility surveys, and provides engineering support for base infrastructure.

title: Fire Protection
description: Responds to aircraft and structural fires, conducts rescue operations, and enforces fire prevention standards.

title: Personnel
description: Manages military personnel records, assignments, promotions, and human resources services for Air Force members.

title: Services
description: Manages lodging, fitness centers, food service, and morale programs supporting quality of life on Air Force bases.

title: Security Forces
description: Protects Air Force personnel, resources, and installations through law enforcement, security, and force protection.

title: Health Services Management
description: Manages administrative operations of Air Force medical facilities including patient records and scheduling.

title: Aerospace Medical Service
description: Provides emergency, preventive, and primary medical care to Air Force personnel as a medical technician.
